subject: LU-12352 libcfs: crashes with certain cpu part numbers

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

parents.subject: LU-13960 tests: correct usage of _var variable

commit.subject: LU-12352 libcfs: crashes with certain cpu part numbers
commit.message:
LU-12352 libcfs: crashes with certain cpu part numbers

Due to a bug in the code, libcfs will crash if the
number of online cpus does not divide by the number
of cpu partitions.

Based on the checks in cfs_cpt_table_create(), it
appears that the original intent was to push the
remaining cpus into the initial partitions.

So let's do that properly.
